A Private Resort on the Little Wicomico

The
River
Retreat.

A turnkey waterfront haven — ten minutes by boat to the open Chesapeake. Bring your vessel, your dog, your laptop, or just a swimsuit. Everything else is already here.

§ 01

Four reasons to drop the lines

Outdoor Living · I

Chesapeake-grade alfresco, from sunrise to last star.

The screened porch seats eight over the water. The side deck is built for a crab feast — picnic table, gas grill, and a Blackstone griddle for when the tide turns. After dinner: hammock, fire pit, night sky.

  • Screened porch seating for 8 over the river
  • Blackstone griddle + gas grill + crab-picking table
  • Waterfront fire pit + hammock
Boat & Rod · II

A boater's dream. Skip the marina — BYOB.

Launch at the community ramp, run up to our private lighted dock, and store high-and-dry on the 12,000 lb lift. Fishing gear and crab pots stocked in the guest-accessible shed.

  • Private dock · 4–5 ft MLW · lights + ladder
  • 12,000 lb boat lift for guest use
  • Rods, tackle & crab pots provided
Adventure Fleet · III

No rentals. The fleet is already yours.

Two kayaks and two stand-up paddleboards launch right off the lowered lift. Three high-end Trek and Specialized bikes in the shed for the neighborhood loop. Cornhole, horseshoes, and community pool + playground access round it out.

  • 2 kayaks + 2 SUPs at the dock
  • 3 bikes — Trek & Specialized, adult-sized
  • Pool + playground · community access included
Work & Tech · IV

A remote-work oasis, wired for it.

1 GB symmetric fiber. A dedicated Tesla wall charger in the driveway. Smart TVs throughout, an Xbox for rainy afternoons, and a 5-gallon water cooler so nobody's hauling plastic jugs from the store.

  • 1 GB fiber Wi-Fi · video-call stable
  • Tesla wall charger · dedicated circuit
  • Smart TVs + Xbox + 5-gal water cooler

§ 04

Life on the water

A few scenes from the river and the Bay — shot from the dock, the boat, and the water just beyond.

§ 05

For the boater · a note from the dock

4–5 ftMean Low Water

A reliable slip, a serious lift.

The private dock carries a very reliable 4–5 feet of Mean Low Water, with a 12,000 lb capacity lift available for guest use. To ensure safety with fully loaded vessels, we recommend a maximum dry boat weight of 10,000 lbs. Use of the lift and dock is at the boat owner's own risk.

Just bring groceries & a swimsuit.
The rest is waiting.
142 Swann Ct · Reedville VA
The River Retreat · Est. on the Chesapeake
